issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has a [Your Turn] passive ability that reduces cost of Celestial Dragons characters (cost ≥2) by 1, but no effects are defined.
[Your Turn] indicates duration constraint—should use trigger 'StartOfTurn' or similar with duration 'DuringYourTurn', not left empty.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] The cost of playing {Celestial Dragons} type Character cards with a cost of 2 or more from your hand will be reduced by 1.
